children.heading: Required reporting of swaps not accepted by any derivatives clearing organization
children.label: a Required reporting of swaps not accepted by any derivatives clearing organization
A
children.text: a swap data repository described in ; orsection 24a of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case in which there is no swap data repository that would accept the swap, to the Commission pursuant to this section within such time period as the Commission may by rule or regulation prescribe.

children.label: i
children.text: 30 days after issuance of the interim final rule; or

children.label: ii
children.text: such other period as the Commission determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Commission rulemaking
children.label: B Commission rulemaking
children.text: The Commission shall promulgate an interim final rule within 90 days of , providing for the reporting of each swap entered into before .July 21, 2010July 21, 2010

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: C Effective date
children.text: The reporting provisions described in this section shall be effective upon the enactment of this section.

children.heading: Swaps in which only 1 counterparty is a swap dealer or major swap participant
children.label: A Swaps in which only 1 counterparty is a swap dealer or major swap participant
children.text: With respect to a swap in which only 1 counterparty is a swap dealer or major swap participant, the swap dealer or major swap participant shall report the swap as required under paragraphs (1) and (2).

children.heading: Swaps in which 1 counterparty is a swap dealer and the other a major swap participant
children.label: B Swaps in which 1 counterparty is a swap dealer and the other a major swap participant
children.text: With respect to a swap in which 1 counterparty is a swap dealer and the other a major swap participant, the swap dealer shall report the swap as required under paragraphs (1) and (2).

children.heading: Other swaps
children.label: C Other swaps
children.text: With respect to any other swap not described in subparagraph (A) or (B), the counterparties to the swap shall select a counterparty to report the swap as required under paragraphs (1) and (2).
clear the swap in accordance with ; orsection 2(h)(1) of this title
have the data regarding the swap accepted by a swap data repository in accordance with rules (including timeframes) adopted by the Commission under .section 24a of this title
upon written request from the Commission, provide reports regarding the swaps held by the individual or entity to the Commission in such form and in such manner as the Commission may request; and

children.label: D
children.text: the Financial Stability Oversight Council; and

children.heading: Identical data
children.label: d Identical data
children.text: In prescribing rules under this section, the Commission shall require individuals and entities described in subsection (b) to submit to the Commission a report that contains data that is not less comprehensive than the data required to be collected by swap data repositories under .section 24a of this title
